title: Create More
description: A modpack based around Create with world improvement, building, quality of life and optimization mods, providing a fun and smooth Create experience.
body:
## About the modpack
This modpack is primarily focused on create with alot of create add-ons. It also has build mods and terrain generation mods so it has that modded feel. There are also quality of life mods for a better and smoother experience. The modpack is also pretty lightweight as the number of mods are limited and optimalization mods are also present. It uses the latest version of the main Create mod (1.21.1) with the neoforge mod loader.

Description will be updated soon
